components.exemptReason: Label text inherits themed button/control state.
Container participates in :has() state selectors; themed child surfaces carry visual tokens.
SVG chart geometry is transparent; segment color is dynamic data color.
SVG segment stroke uses dynamic per-balance color and must not be theme-normalized.
Color preview intentionally uses the currently picked color.
Theme preview intentionally renders the candidate theme, not the active theme.
Consolas preview intentionally renders the candidate theme.
Matrix preview intentionally renders the candidate theme.
Theme swatches intentionally render candidate theme color fields.
